summary: Landing→app handoff: shared SloppyPromptTour, AuDHD↔LLM analog tour, live compile with cognitive context injection
details:
SESSION ARC (June 30, 2026)

1) FUNDAMENTAL LANDING UX FIX (prior turn)
- Problem: Landing invited free-text prompts + /api/generate-prompt; failed for anonymous users without API keys.
- Fix: Selection-first demo with four preset sloppy prompts, local canned audit/compile, secondary paste-your-own heuristic.

2) COGNITIVE ANALOG LAYER (prior turn)
- Source doc: AuDHD and LLM Cognitive Analogs (Downloads) — isomorphism thesis (WM overflow, Lost in the Middle, monotropism, confabulation/DRM, time blindness, hyper-systemizing).
- Extended demoPromptScenarios.ts: per-scenario cognitive block (label, humanParallel, llmParallel, insight, mitigation, cite, scaffolds, metricLabels).
- Landing scanner: cognitive insight panel, renamed metrics (executive load, WM overflow, confabulation pressure), scaffold chips on compiled output.

3) APP UNIFICATION (this turn)
- Problem: /app did NOT repeat landing tour; different forced-choice (architecture survey, STARTER_SCENARIOS, Impulsivity Shield SSOT questions).
- Shared SSOT:
  • src/lib/demoPromptAudit.ts — scanFromScenario, scanFromHeuristic, buildCognitiveCompileContext
  • src/components/CognitiveAnalogPanel.tsx — reusable dark/light panel
  • src/components/SloppyPromptTour.tsx — mode=demo (landing) | mode=live (/app)
- LandingPageManual.tsx refactored to SloppyPromptTour layout=split; compiler Open codespace links to /app?stage=compile&scenario=<id>
- LlmOsPromptCompiler.tsx: SloppyPromptTour mode=live atop compile panel; ?scenario= deep link; activeSloppyScenario injected into handleOptimize payload before /api/generate-prompt

USER FLOWS
- Visitor: pick scenario → cognitive analog audit (local) → demo compiled spec OR Live compile in codespace with same scenario
- App user: same scenario chips + panel → survey scaffolds → Optimize Prompt Spec (real LLM via BYOK/free tier)

UNCHANGED (intentionally separate)
- Impulsivity Shield: 7 SSOT bloat questions (impulsivityShield tab)
- STARTER_SCENARIOS dropdown: full-app build templates
- samplePresets: Anti-Forgetfulness etc.

FILES TOUCHED
- src/lib/demoPromptScenarios.ts (created/extended)
- src/lib/demoPromptAudit.ts (new)
- src/components/CognitiveAnalogPanel.tsx (new)
- src/components/SloppyPromptTour.tsx (new)
- src/pages/LandingPageManual.tsx
- src/components/LlmOsPromptCompiler.tsx
- src/index.css (cognitive + light variant styles)

VERIFY: npm run lint PASS; npm run build PASS.
